name: Summer Fun
note: Hand-captured digest of the official notes. Balance-only patch: no map/system changes, no ARAM section; the theme is a broad sustain nerf (potions, healing Eternals, lifesteal items) plus tank tenacity up, with ~30 hero touches.
global: Gifting: cosmetics can now be gifted to friends in-game
Ranked placement matches now count toward seasonal rewards (bugfix)

tldr.text: Potions heal less, healing minors (Krix, Idrisil, Xyris, Exarch, Lotus) all trimmed, Marrow omnivamp down, Solaris and Fist Of Razuul healing 65% -> 50%. Fights should end with less resetting.
Unbroken Will 25 -> 30, World Breaker 20 -> 25, Vanguardian 20 -> 25 tenacity; Flux Matrix and Absolution trade stats toward magical armor. Crowd-control comps lose some lock-down value.
Left Crunch cleave 60% -> 100% — the single biggest number in the patch for wave-clear and jungle pace.
War Anthem heals 50% less but grants Physical Power from both auras; Thunk and the ult scale much harder. Battle-Narbash is now a real direction.

tldr.lead: Mage bases taxed, kits paid back
tldr.text: Gideon, Gadget, Howitzer, Iggy & Scorch all lose base stats or regen but gain ability damage — lane sustain down, spike damage up.
Base power and regen down, Brine gold and range down — but Hydroclasm gains 40% magical-armor penetration on Brine-popped bubbles and the passive heal scales by rank now.
Kallari loses movement speed, Death Mark and Shadow Walk cooldowns lengthen, Shadow Dance damage down — the Platinum+ terror gets its first real bill.

eternals.summary: A sweep against sustain and free value: every healing minor trimmed (Krix, Idrisil, Xyris, Exarch), Lotus and Demiurge utility taxed, Marrow omnivamp down. Vermis and Thraex are the only clean winners.

changes.name: Vermis
changes.meaning: A small late-game bump for scaling damage dealers — the extra 0.05% per level only matters past the mid game.

changes.name: Marrow
changes.meaning: Flat omnivamp starts lower but grows faster: weaker in early skirmishes, roughly break-even by max level, so it now rewards longer games.

changes.name: Thraex
changes.meaning: Rallying Roar gets noticeably faster engage and disengage — stronger on supports and divers who pop it to start or leave fights.

changes.name: Krix
changes.change: Regenerative Tissue top ranks 0.8%/1.2% -> 0.7%/1%; Voracity max-health healing 1% -> 0.75% (kill gold 2 -> 3)
changes.meaning: Part of the patch-wide sustain tax: both healing lines come down, with a small kill-gold sweetener that pushes it toward aggressive junglers rather than attrition laners.

changes.name: Idrisil
changes.meaning: A straight trim to its top-rank regen — lane attrition with Mending is a little weaker, in line with the potion nerfs.

changes.name: Xyris
changes.meaning: Crit builds heal slightly less per strike; barely felt mid-game, a real trim on full-crit carries late.

changes.name: Exarch
changes.meaning: Dedicated healers lose a slice of their amplified output — stacks with the Solaris/Fist of Razuul healing cuts, so pure-sustain supports feel it twice.

changes.name: Lotus
changes.change: Immaculate damage reduction 20% -> 15%; Prima Donna damage taken 5% -> 6%
changes.meaning: The defensive window is meaningfully weaker: a quarter of the damage reduction is gone and Prima Donna taxes a bit more, so it no longer turns dives off by itself.

changes.name: Demiurge
changes.change: Construct ability haste 1.25 -> 1; Bloatware damage reduction 1% -> 0.75%
changes.meaning: Both perks shaved — ability-haste ramp and the damage-reduction stack. Still the utility pick, just less free value on cooldown casters.

changes.name: Aion
changes.meaning: A light touch on scaling magical power; late-game mages lose a sliver of their ceiling, nothing that changes the pick.

items: Scattershot: Physical power 30% -> 40%, +50% bonus minion damage, but no longer benefits from lifesteal
Absolution: Cost 3150 -> 3100; attack speed 25% -> 35%; physical power 40 -> 30; magical armor 35 -> 40
Earthshaker: Physical power 40 -> 45, health 250 -> 300, haste 10 -> 15, Battleborn 1% -> 1.25%; 20% attack speed removed
Mutilator: Fixed Mutilate damage bug and cleave interaction
Dreambinder: Magical power 80 -> 70; Chilling Spells slow 25% -> 30%; DoT slow 15% -> 20%
Orb Of Growth: Art Of Fortitude healing 3% over 3s -> 3% over 5s
Orb Of Enlightenment: Health per level 15 -> 12; Art Of Fortitude 3% over 3s -> 3% over 5s
Crescelia: Cost 2450 -> 2300; haste 20 -> 15; Moonblade loses 12% CDR, gains +12 gold on hero hit
Dawnstar: Crusader applies a damage-reduction stack when an enemy is immobilized
Dynamo: Physical armor 25 -> 30; Immobilizer damage amp 10% -> 8%
Frosted Lure: Health 300 -> 325; armor 35 -> 40; Frostwaver damage 50 -> 80, range 550 -> 650

ranked.summary: No ranked-system changes this patch beyond fixes: placement matches now count toward seasonal rewards, pre-selected heroes are immediately selectable after bans, and Draft-dodge bans display their reason and duration.
changes: Ranked placement matches now count toward seasonal rewards
Pre-selected heroes in Ranked Draft are immediately selectable after bans
Draft Dodge bans now display reason and duration
Court Of Roses ally damage reduction 15% -> 20%
Crushing Maw damage +5, adds 4% bonus-health scaling (power scalings trimmed)
Consume bite damage +5, bite heal 2/2.5/3% -> 2.5/3.5/4.5% max health
Fixed Overseer not amplifying Cryoseism damage
Tesseract attack speed per canister -1% all tiers; non-hero healing 25% -> 20%
Primeval Roar damage reduction top rank 36% -> 30%
Zero Shift ranged-stance physical power -2 all ranks
Focal Lens armor shred 20% -> 25% + stacking bugfix
Make Way damage up (280 -> 310 top), cooldown +1s, scaling 100% -> 90%
Stone Forged Soul damage 240/370/500 -> 250/400/550; min heal 10-14% -> 14-18%; max heal 30-40% -> 35-45%; fixed 2.5x heal multiplier and Tainted interaction
Assault Mode physical power 12.5% -> 10%, magical power 9% -> 8%
Double Pain scaling up to 165% top rank, cooldowns +0.5s
Combat Thrusters move speed down; Blast Off CDR 12% -> 15%
Herald bubble healing 3 -> 4-12 by rank; anomaly window 5s -> 4s, burn 0.6% -> 0.75%
Hydroclasm slow 12% -> 15%, charged bubble +10, scaling 65% -> 70%; NEW: Brine-popped bubbles penetrate 40% magical armor
Brine scaling 55% -> 50%, kill gold down, range 1900 -> 1750, cooldown floor 3 -> 4
Flame Turret scaling 28% -> 30%, turret health up
Oil Spill 50-210 -> 70-210 flat, scaling 45% -> 50%, slow scales by rank to 50%
Slayer Of The Heavens minion-aggro bugfix
Health regen 1.8 -> 1.55; physical power growth 1.49 -> 1.65; armor 27 -> 29
Maco Fly shield scaling 5.5% -> 4%, magical power 40% -> 50%, dash slower
Physical power 59 -> 58; regen, both armors down
War Anthem reworked: auras heal 50% less, both grant physical power (March up to 50)
Song Of My People regen scales magical power; move speed band flattened
Crash Bang Boom knock-up damage 50/75/100 -> 80/150/220 + 100% bonus-physical scaling
Tiny Titan attack speed down; Rock & Awe max range 6000 -> 4000
Gravebreaker: Colossal Blow now damages towers (25% max-health true damage)
Plasma Barrage adds 6% missing-health physical damage
Fixed Inner Fire stealth removal when Heightened Senses activated
Health regen 2.1 -> 1.8 (growth down); physical armor growth 5.2 -> 4.8; mana 330 -> 350
Ruthless Assault armor steal 37.5% -> 35%, mana flat 50
Severance damage down (-25 top rank) but scaling 105% -> 115%
Soul Weaver ult CDR 8% -> 10%; Ephemeral Surge move speed 35% -> 25%, duration shorter
